sentences.english: The more I try not to tell someone, the more I want to.
sentences.korean: 말하지 않으려 할수록 더 말하고 싶어져요.

sentences.english: I can keep a secret forever if someone asks me to, because trust is everything.
sentences.korean: 누가 부탁하면 비밀을 영원히 지킬 수 있어요. 신뢰가 전부니까요.

sentences.english: I think some secrets should be shared, especially if someone is in trouble or needs help.
sentences.korean: 어떤 비밀은 공유해야 한다고 생각해요. 특히 누군가 곤란하거나 도움이 필요할 때요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
